name: Waraba Gold Limited
summary: Waraba Gold Limited focuses on the acquisition and evaluation of gold properties in Mali, West Africa. Its flagship prospective gold exploration project is the Fokolore Project located in West Mali. The company was formerly known as Zenith Exploration Inc. and changed its name to Waraba Gold Limited in October 2020. Waraba Gold Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
